heading: Omitted
label: 83a to 83e Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 83a to 83e were omitted in view of abolition of Federal Radio Commission by , , which was classified to former .act June 19, 1934, ch. 652, title VI, § 60348 Stat. 1102section 603 of this titleSection 83a, , pt. II, title V, § 511, , abolished Radio Division of Department of Commerce and transferred its powers and duties to Federal Radio Commission.act June 30, 1932, ch. 31447 Stat. 417Section 83b, , pt. II, title V, § 512, , transferred officers and employees of Radio Division to Federal Radio Commission.act June 30, 1932, ch. 31447 Stat. 417Section 83c, , pt. II, title V, § 513, , provided that orders, rules, regulations, and laws of Radio Division have continuing application until modified, amended or repealed by Federal Radio Commission.act June 30, 1932, ch. 31447 Stat. 417Section 83d, , pt. II, title V, § 514, , transferred unexpended appropriations from Radio Division to Federal Radio Commission.act June 30, 1932, ch. 31447 Stat. 417Section 83e, , , related to adjustment of classification or compensation of employees.act Mar. 28, 1934, ch. 102, title I, § 148 Stat. 513
